programming.add_key: Supported only where the selected Ford PATS tool explicitly covers the exact S550 build
programming.all_keys_lost: Exact-build coverage required; later vehicles may require online Ford security access

vehicle_information.notes: Silca explicitly lists Ford Mustang S550 from 2017 with HU101, 433 MHz and ID47. The UK S550 generation began in 2015, so 2015-2016 vehicles must still be checked against VIN/original key before supply, but the principal UK S550 key family is now mapped.

vehicle_information.immobiliser_generation: Exact S650 implementation requires current tool/OEM confirmation
vehicle_information.blade_profile: Emergency blade requires exact physical-key confirmation

programming.all_keys_lost: Do not accept without explicit S650 support and online-authorisation check
programming.online_requirement: Likely operation dependent; verify before booking

vehicle_information.notes: The current S650 is isolated from S550 data. Do not inherit the older key or programming route without an exact current-generation application source.
